text.title: Design System Success Factors Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: measure-docs-freshness
step.action: Compute days since docs generated from source.

step.name: measure-adoption
step.action: Per consuming team: % imports from system / total.

step.name: verify-contribution-model
step.action: Check RFC template present + last 5 contributions used the model.

step.name: compute-coverage-and-publish
step.decision-gate: If coverage_pct <70, attach remediation plan before publish.
